title: Log Ground Temperature
description: Use a buried thermistor with Arduino to monitor ground temperature over time.

dialogue.text: Ready to take your geothermal survey further? Let's log the ground temperature for a few days.
Wire a thermistor as in the arduino-thermistor-read process and bury the sensor about a meter deep. Connect the Arduino to record readings.
Great! With consistent data you'll know if a heat pump will work year-round.
